# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 11
#### Article 48
##### § 2291 — Disposition of fees

The commissioner shall deposit all monies received from the registration of ATVs and all fees otherwise collected under this article to the credit of the general fund, as prescribed by § 2282 (Registration and permit) .

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
